title: polypodium lasiosorum
intro: Polypodium lasiosorum, also known as Polypodium lepidoton or Lepidoton, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lasiosorum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to prepare remedies for a range of health issues.
